message:
Skip OCSF generation in PR builds

OCSF reference generation takes 20-30 seconds and is only needed
for production deployments. PR previews don't need OCSF docs since
they're not part of the checked-in repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,6 +49,7 @@ jobs:
         run: pnpm generate:claude-plugins
 
       - name: Generate OCSF reference
+        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
         run: pnpm generate:ocsf:all
 
       - name: Generate docs map
